final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SNS topic with email subscription

Resources:
  SNSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Customer managed key for SNS topic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      PendingWindowInDays: 7

  SNSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/sns-cmk
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  MyNotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyNotificationTopic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  EmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: test@test.com
      TopicArn: !Ref MyNotificationTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for basic EC2 instance with SSM management'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    AllowedPattern: '^/aws/service/|^ami-.*'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-Subnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-RouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Minimal security group for SSM'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-SecurityGroup'

  IAMRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSM-InstanceRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref IAMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      DisableApiTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp2
            VolumeSize: 8
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'SSMManagedInstance'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'Instance ID of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  AvailabilityZone:
    Description: 'Availability Zone of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.AvailabilityZone

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a single ENI with two EIPs and secondary private IPs

Resources:
  AppVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AppVPC
        - Key: Application
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  AppSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AppVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AppSubnet
        - Key: Application
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref AppSubnet
      Description: ENI with secondary private IPs for multi-IP setup
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
          Primary: false
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.20
          Primary: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIPENI
        - Key: Application
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EIP-1
        - Key: Application
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EIP-2
        - Key: Application
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !Ref EIP1
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10

  EIPAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !Ref EIP2
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.20

Outputs:
  ENIId:
    Description: The ID of the Elastic Network Interface
    Value: !Ref ENI

  EIP1AllocationId:
    Description: The allocation ID of the first Elastic IP
    Value: !Ref EIP1

  EIP2AllocationId:
    Description: The allocation ID of the second Elastic IP
    Value: !Ref EIP2

  SecondaryPrivateIP1:
    Description: The first secondary private IP address on the ENI
    Value: 10.0.1.10

  SecondaryPrivateIP2:
    Description: The second secondary private IP address on the ENI
    Value: 10.0.1.20

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Client VPN monitoring dashboard and log group'

Mappings:
  TimeRanges:
    Last1Hour:
      value: 'now-1h'
    Last24Hours:
      value: 'now-24h'

Resources:
  ClientVpnLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/vpn/client-vpn-endpoint
      RetentionInDays: 90

  ClientVpnDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: ClientVpnMonitoringDashboard
      DashboardBody:
        Fn::Join:
          - ''
          - - |-
              {"widgets":[
            - |-
              {"type":"text","x":0,"y":0,"width":24,"height":2,"properties":{"markdown":"## AWS Client VPN Monitoring Dashboard\\n\\nThis dashboard provides insights into AWS Client VPN usage including connection durations, data transfer, user activity, and authentication methods. Use the queries below to analyze logs from the Client VPN endpoint log group."}},
            - |-
              {"type":"text","x":0,"y":2,"width":24,"height":1,"properties":{"markdown":"## Connection Duration Analysis"}},
            - |-
              {"type":"log:LogTable","x":0,"y":3,"width":24,"height":6,"properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, endpoint-name, connection-duration | stats avg(connection-duration) as AvgDuration, max(connection-duration) as MaxDuration, min(connection-duration) as MinDuration by endpoint-name | sort endpoint-name","region":"us-east-1","logGroups":[" 
            - !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup
            - |-
              "],"timeRange":{"relative":{"since":" 
            - !FindInMap [TimeRanges, Last24Hours, value]
            - |-
              "}}}},
            - |-
              {"type":"text","x":0,"y":9,"width":24,"height":1,"properties":{"markdown":"## Data Transfer (Ingress/Egress)"}},
            - |-
              {"type":"log:Bar","x":0,"y":10,"width":24,"height":6,"properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, endpoint-name, ingress-bytes, egress-bytes | stats sum(ingress-bytes) as TotalIngress, sum(egress-bytes) as TotalEgress by endpoint-name | sort endpoint-name","region":"us-east-1","logGroups":[" 
            - !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup
            - |-
              "],"timeRange":{"relative":{"since":" 
            - !FindInMap [TimeRanges, Last24Hours, value]
            - |-
              "}}}},
            - |-
              {"type":"text","x":0,"y":16,"width":24,"height":1,"properties":{"markdown":"## User Activity & Authentication Methods"}},
            - |-
              {"type":"log:LogTable","x":0,"y":17,"width":12,"height":6,"properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, authentication-type, common-name | stats count_distinct(common-name) as DistinctUsers by authentication-type | sort authentication-type","region":"us-east-1","logGroups":[" 
            - !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup
            - |-
              "],"timeRange":{"relative":{"since":" 
            - !FindInMap [TimeRanges, Last24Hours, value]
            - |-
              "}}}},
            - |-
              {"type":"log:LogTable","x":12,"y":17,"width":12,"height":6,"properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, authentication-type, common-name, connection-duration | stats count() as TotalConnections, sum(connection-duration) as TotalDuration, avg(connection-duration) as AvgDuration by authentication-type | sort authentication-type","region":"us-east-1","logGroups":[" 
            - !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup
            - |-
              "],"timeRange":{"relative":{"since":" 
            - !FindInMap [TimeRanges, Last24Hours, value]
            - |-
              "}}}},
            - |-
              {"type":"text","x":0,"y":23,"width":24,"height":1,"properties":{"markdown":"## Endpoint-Specific Usage"}},
            - |-
              {"type":"log:LogTable","x":0,"y":24,"width":24,"height":6,"properties":{"query":"fields @timestamp, endpoint-name, common-name, connection-duration, ingress-bytes, egress-bytes | stats count() as TotalConnections, sum(connection-duration) as TotalDuration, avg(connection-duration) as AvgDuration, sum(ingress-bytes) as TotalIngress, sum(egress-bytes) as TotalEgress by endpoint-name | sort endpoint-name","region":"us-east-1","logGroups":[" 
            - !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup
            - |-
              "],"timeRange":{"relative":{"since":" 
            - !FindInMap [TimeRanges, Last24Hours, value]
            - |-
              "}}}}
            - |-
              ]}

Outputs:
  DashboardName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Dashboard
    Value: !Ref ClientVpnDashboard
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for Client VPN logs
    Value: !Ref ClientVpnLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "EFS cross-AZ EC2 instances with monitoring and signaling"

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: "10.0.0.0/16"
    Description: "CIDR block for the VPC"

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-Public-Subnet-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-Public-Subnet-2"

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-Public-RT"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  NetworkACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-NACL"

  NFSInboundRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049

  SSHInboundRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  EphemeralInboundRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  OutboundTCPRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  OutboundUDPRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  OutboundICMPRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 1
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  S3GatewayEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3"
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref RouteTable

  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  CloudFormationEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.cloudformation"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SGEC2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for EC2 instances"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "SG-EC2"

  SGEFS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for EFS mount targets"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref SGEC2
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "SG-EFS"

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "SharedEFS"

  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SGEFS

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SGEFS

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CfnSignalAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudformation:SignalResource
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EC2-EFS-Role"

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  SNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for SNS topic encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey"
            Resource: "*"
      Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "SNS-Encryption-Key"

  SNSEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: "alias/efs-sns-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey

  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: "{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}"
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
            mkdir -p /mnt/efs
            for i in $(seq 1 30); do
              mount -t efs ${EFSFileSystem}:/ /mnt/efs && break
              sleep 10
            done
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --exit-code $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance1 --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EC2-EFS-Instance1"
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: "{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}"
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SGEC2
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
            mkdir -p /mnt/efs
            for i in $(seq 1 30); do
              mount -t efs ${EFSFileSystem}:/ /mnt/efs && break
              sleep 10
            done
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --exit-code $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance2 --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EC2-EFS-Instance2"
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: "EFS-Alarms-Topic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "EFS-Alarms-Topic"

  PercentIOLimitAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "EFS-PercentIOLimit"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when EFS I/O limit exceeds 95%"
      Namespace: "AWS/EFS"
      MetricName: "PercentIOLimit"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

  ThroughputPercentAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: "EFS-ThroughputPercent"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when EFS throughput utilization exceeds 80%"
      Namespace: "AWS/EFS"
      MetricName: "ThroughputPercent"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref VPC

  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: "EFS File System ID"
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem

  EC2Instance1Id:
    Description: "EC2 Instance 1 ID"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance1

  EC2Instance2Id:
    Description: "EC2 Instance 2 ID"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance2

  EFSMountTargetDNS:
    Description: "DNS name of the EFS mount targets"
    Value: !Sub "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for Etherpad deployment with CodeDeploy pipeline, ALB, Auto Scaling, RDS, and SSM.

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    AllowedPattern: '^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}$'
  PublicSubnet1CIDR:
    Description: CIDR for public subnet 1
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PublicSubnet2CIDR:
    Description: CIDR for public subnet 2
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Description: CIDR for private subnet 1 (RDS)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Description: CIDR for private subnet 2 (RDS)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.4.0/24
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type for Auto Scaling
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
  SSHLocation:
    Description: IP CIDR allowed SSH access (e.g., your office IP). Default is restricted to loopback.
    Type: String
    Default: 127.0.0.1/32
    AllowedPattern: '^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}$'
  AMIId:
    Description: Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID for the region (default for us-east-1)
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Default: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
  Environment:
    Description: Environment name for tagging
    Type: String
    Default: production
  ApplicationName:
    Description: Application name
    Type: String
    Default: Etherpad
  CertArn:
    Description: ARN of an ACM certificate for HTTPS listener on the ALB
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: ^arn:aws:acm:[a-z0-9-]+:\d{12}:certificate/[a-f0-9-]+$

Resources:
  # KMS Key for RDS and S3 encryption
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for RDS and S3 encryption
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
  KMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Subnets (for RDS)
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Private Route Table (no internet)
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnet1Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # ALB Security Group
  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Application Load Balancer
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'

  ALBSecurityGroupEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 1024
      ToPort: 65535
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

  # Application Load Balancer (internal)
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Target Group
  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-tg'
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      TargetGroupAttributes:
        - Key: deregistration_delay.timeout_seconds
          Value: '60'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # HTTP Listener (redirect to HTTPS)
  HTTPRedirectListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: HTTPS
            Port: 443
            Host: '#{host}'
            Path: '/#{path}'
            Query: '#{query}'
            StatusCode: HTTP_301

  # HTTPS Listener (forward to target group)
  HTTPSListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 443
      Protocol: HTTPS
      Certificates:
        - CertificateArn: !Ref CertArn
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup

  # EC2 Security Group for instances
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Etherpad EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 128.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/1
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 128.0.0.0/1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'

  # Egress rule from instances to RDS
  InstanceToRDSEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup

  # RDS Security Group
  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  # RDS DB Subnet Group
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS MySQL
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group'

  # Secrets Manager Secret for RDS password
  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret'
      Description: Secret for RDS MySQL master user
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'password'
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # RDS MySQL Instance
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: '8.0.40'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      MultiAZ: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      MasterUsername: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}:SecretString:username}}'
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}:SecretString:password}}'
      DBName: etherpad
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '02:00-03:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'Sun:03:00-Sun:04:00'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # SSM Parameters for DB connection details
  SSMDBEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db/endpoint'
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
      Description: RDS MySQL endpoint

  SSMDBPort:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db/port'
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Port
      Description: RDS MySQL port

  SSMDBName:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db/name'
      Type: String
      Value: etherpad
      Description: RDS database name

  SSMDBUsername:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db/username'
      Type: String
      Value: admin
      Description: RDS MySQL master username

  # S3 Bucket for CodeDeploy artifacts
  ArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  ArtifactBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ArtifactBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonHttpsTraffic
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ArtifactBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  # VPC Gateway Endpoint for S3
  S3GatewayEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3'
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Interface VPC Endpoints for SSM and CodeDeploy
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  CodeDeployCommandsEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.codedeploy-commands-secure'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # IAM Role for EC2 Instances
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforAWSCodeDeploy
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3ArtifactAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${ArtifactBucket.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance-profile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # Launch Template
  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lt'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AMIId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -xe
            # Install dependencies
            yum update -y
            amazon-linux-extras install -y nodejs14
            # Install CodeDeploy Agent
            yum install -y ruby wget
            cd /home/ec2-user
            wget https://aws-codedeploy-${AWS::Region}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/latest/install
            chmod +x ./install
            ./install auto
            # Start CodeDeploy agent
            service codedeploy-agent start
            # Signal CloudFormation
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AutoScalingGroup --region ${AWS::Region}
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 20
              VolumeType: gp2
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance'
              - Key: Environment
                Value: !Ref Environment
          - ResourceType: volume
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-volume'
              - Key: Environment
                Value: !Ref Environment

  # Auto Scaling Group
  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-asg'
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '3'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-asg'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # IAM Role for CodeDeploy
  CodeDeployRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-codedeploy-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSCodeDeployRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # CodeDeploy Application
  CodeDeployApplication:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app'
      ComputePlatform: Server

  # CodeDeploy Deployment Group
  CodeDeployDeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref CodeDeployApplication
      DeploymentGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dg'
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployRole.Arn
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref AutoScalingGroup
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime
      DeploymentStyle:
        DeploymentOption: WITH_TRAFFIC_CONTROL
        DeploymentType: IN_PLACE
      Ec2TagFilters:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance'
          Type: KEY_AND_VALUE
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  ALBDNSName:
    Description: DNS name of the Application Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
  RDSHost:
    Description: RDS MySQL endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSPort:
    Description: RDS MySQL port
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Port
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for deployment artifacts
    Value: !Ref ArtifactBucket
  CodeDeployApplicationName:
    Description: CodeDeploy application name
    Value: !Ref CodeDeployApplication
  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling group name
    Value: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
  InstanceRoleArn:
    Description: IAM role ARN for EC2 instances
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Role.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: CloudFormation template for a MySQL RDS instance with Provisioned IOPS in a dedicated VPC, using Secrets Manager for the master password.

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the first private subnet.
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the second private subnet.
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    Description: Allocated storage size in GB for the RDS instance.
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3000
    Description: Provisioned IOPS for the RDS instance.
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.r5.large
    Description: DB instance class.
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    Description: Master username for the RDS instance.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2"

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS MySQL
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group"

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL allowing internal VPC traffic on port 3306
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg"

  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/rds/${AWS::StackName}/mysql-password"
      Description: Master password for RDS MySQL
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username":"${MasterUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludePunctuation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret"

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      StorageType: io1
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      MasterUsername: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}::username}}'
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}::password}}'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      MultiAZ: false
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-instance"

Outputs:
  DBEndpoint:
    Description: Endpoint address of the RDS instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  DBPort:
    Description: Port number of the RDS instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Port
  SecretARN:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret for the master password
    Value: !Ref RDSSecret

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'URL-to-PNG Screenshot Service with SQS, S3, Auto Scaling, and Load Testing'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI from SSM parameter store

  WorkerInstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type for screenshot worker instances

  TestInstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.nano
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
    Description: EC2 instance type for the load test instance

  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: screenshot-service
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging

Metadata:
  'AWS::CloudFormation::Interface':
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: Infrastructure
        Parameters:
          - WorkerInstanceType
          - TestInstanceType
          - LatestAmiId
      - Label:
          default: Environment
        Parameters:
          - EnvironmentName

Resources:
  # ========== VPC ==========
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-public-rt'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetA:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs:
              Ref: 'AWS::Region'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-subnet-a'

  SubnetB:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::GetAZs:
              Ref: 'AWS::Region'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-subnet-b'

  SubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # ========== KMS Keys ==========
  SQSQueueKMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: Customer managed KMS key for SQS queue encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT

  ScreenshotBucketKMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for screenshot bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT

  # ========== SQS ==========
  ScreenshotQueueDLQ:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-screenshots-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSQueueKMSKey

  ScreenshotQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-screenshots'
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSQueueKMSKey
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueueDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3

  # ========== S3 ==========
  ScreenshotBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-screenshots-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ScreenshotBucketKMSKey
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireOldScreenshots
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-screenshots-bucket'

  ScreenshotBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ScreenshotBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowWorkerPutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt WorkerRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub '${ScreenshotBucket.Arn}/*'

  # ========== IAM Roles ==========
  WorkerRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: WorkerInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
                  - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
                  - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
                Resource: !Sub '${ScreenshotBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:DescribeKey'
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotBucketKMSKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudwatch:PutMetricData'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-role'

  WorkerInstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-instance-profile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref WorkerRole

  LoadTesterRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-loadtester-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LoadTesterInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sqs:SendMessage'
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-loadtester-role'

  LoadTesterInstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-loadtester-instance-profile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LoadTesterRole

  # ========== Security Group ==========
  ScreenshotSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for screenshot workers and load tester
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-sg'

  ScreenshotSecurityGroupSelfIngress:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress'
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref ScreenshotSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: '-1'
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ScreenshotSecurityGroup

  # ========== Launch Template ==========
  WorkerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate'
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-lt'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref WorkerInstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt WorkerInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref ScreenshotSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64:
            Fn::Sub:
              - |
                #!/bin/bash
                set -ex
                yum update -y
                amazon-linux-extras install epel -y
                yum install -y chromium python3-pip
                pip3 install boto3

                cat > /home/ec2-user/worker.py << 'WORKEREOF'
                import os
                import boto3
                import subprocess
                import tempfile
                import time
                import json
                from urllib.parse import urlparse

                sqs = boto3.client('sqs')
                s3 = boto3.client('s3')
                queue_url = os.environ['QUEUE_URL']
                bucket_name = os.environ['BUCKET_NAME']

                def process_message(body, receipt_handle):
                    try:
                        message = json.loads(body)
                        url = message.get('url')
                        if not url:
                            print('No URL in message')
                            return False
                        parsed = urlparse(url)
                        domain = parsed.netloc.replace('.', '_') if parsed.netloc else 'unknown'
                        timestamp = int(time.time())
                        key = 'screenshots/' + domain + '_' + str(timestamp) + '.png'
                        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='.png') as tmp:
                            cmd = [
                                'chromium-browser', '--headless', '--disable-gpu', '--no-sandbox',
                                '--screenshot', '--window-size=1280,720', tmp.name, url
                            ]
                            subprocess.run(cmd, check=True, capture_output=True)
                            s3.upload_file(tmp.name, bucket_name, key, ExtraArgs={'ContentType': 'image/png'})
                        print('Screenshot saved to s3://' + bucket_name + '/' + key)
                        return True
                    except Exception as e:
                        print('Error processing message: ' + str(e))
                        return False

                def main():
                    while True:
                        try:
                            response = sqs.receive_message(
                                QueueUrl=queue_url,
                                MaxNumberOfMessages=1,
                                WaitTimeSeconds=20
                            )
                            if 'Messages' in response:
                                for msg in response['Messages']:
                                    body = msg['Body']
                                    receipt_handle = msg['ReceiptHandle']
                                    if process_message(body, receipt_handle):
                                        sqs.delete_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, ReceiptHandle=receipt_handle)
                                    else:
                                        sqs.change_message_visibility(
                                            QueueUrl=queue_url,
                                            ReceiptHandle=receipt_handle,
                                            VisibilityTimeout=0
                                        )
                        except Exception as e:
                            print('Error in main loop: ' + str(e))
                            time.sleep(5)

                if __name__ == '__main__':
                    main()
                WORKEREOF

                echo "export QUEUE_URL=${ScreenshotQueue}" >> /etc/environment
                echo "export BUCKET_NAME=${ScreenshotBucket}" >> /etc/environment
                source /etc/environment

                nohup python3 /home/ec2-user/worker.py &>/home/ec2-user/worker.log &
              - ScreenshotQueue: !Ref ScreenshotQueue
                ScreenshotBucket: !Ref ScreenshotBucket
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker'
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 8
              VolumeType: gp2
              Encrypted: true

  # ========== Auto Scaling Group ==========
  WorkerAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup'
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-asg'
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref SubnetA
        - !Ref SubnetB
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WorkerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WorkerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 120
      MetricsCollection:
        - Granularity: '1Minute'
          Metrics:
            - GroupInServiceInstances
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-worker-asg'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # ========== Scaling Policies ==========
  ScaleUpPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-scale-up'
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref WorkerAutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: StepScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      StepAdjustments:
        - MetricIntervalLowerBound: 0
          ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  ScaleDownPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-scale-down'
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref WorkerAutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: StepScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      StepAdjustments:
        - MetricIntervalUpperBound: 0
          ScalingAdjustment: -1
      Cooldown: 600

  # ========== CloudWatch Alarms ==========
  ScaleUpAlarm:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-queue-depth-scale-up'
      AlarmDescription: 'Scale up when queue depth > 5 for 2 consecutive minutes'
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleUpPolicy

  ScaleDownAlarm:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-queue-depth-scale-down'
      AlarmDescription: 'Scale down when queue depth is 0 for 5 consecutive 5-minute periods'
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 5
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleDownPolicy

  # ========== Load Test Instance ==========
  LoadTesterInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref TestInstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !GetAtt LoadTesterInstanceProfile.Arn
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ScreenshotSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: 'required'
        HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp2
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub:
            - |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -ex
              yum update -y
              yum install -y python3-pip
              pip3 install boto3

              cat > /home/ec2-user/loadtest.py << 'TESTEOF'
              import os, boto3, json, time

              sqs = boto3.client('sqs')
              queue_url = '${ScreenshotQueue}'
              sample_urls = [
                  'https://example.com',
                  'https://aws.amazon.com',
                  'https://www.python.org',
                  'https://github.com',
                  'https://stackoverflow.com'
              ]

              for i, url in enumerate(sample_urls):
                  message_body = json.dumps({'url': url})
                  sqs.send_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, MessageBody=message_body)
                  print('Sent message ' + str(i) + ': ' + url)

              print('Load test messages sent.')
              time.sleep(30)
              import subprocess
              subprocess.run(['shutdown', '-h', 'now'])
              TESTEOF

              python3 /home/ec2-user/loadtest.py &
            - ScreenshotQueue: !Ref ScreenshotQueue
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-load-tester'

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the screenshot request queue
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotQueue

  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing screenshots
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotBucket

  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the Auto Scaling group for workers
    Value: !Ref WorkerAutoScalingGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: CloudFormation template for Kinesis Data Stream with CloudWatch alarms and CMK-encrypted SNS topic

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ShardCount: 1
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis

  KinesisAlarmTopicKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Customer managed KMS key for SNS topic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS service to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Enabled: true

  KinesisAlarmTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KinesisAlarmTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KinesisAlarmTopicKey

  WriteThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WriteThroughputAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for Kinesis write throughput exceeding threshold
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: IncomingBytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref KinesisAlarmTopic

  ReadThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ReadThroughputAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for Kinesis read throughput exceeding threshold
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: GetRecords.Bytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref KinesisAlarmTopic

Outputs:
  StreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn

  StreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis stream
    Value: !Ref KinesisStream

  SnsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for alarms
    Value: !Ref KinesisAlarmTopic

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to create an EC2 IP Address Manager (IPAM) for centralized IP management.

Resources:
  Ipam:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: IPAM for centralized IP management
      OperatingRegions:
        - RegionName: !Ref 'AWS::Region'

Outputs:
  IpamArn:
    Description: ARN of the IPAM
    Value: !GetAtt Ipam.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IpamArn'

  IpamId:
