final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 instance with SSM Automation, logging, and monitoring.

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t2.micro
      - t2.small
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - m5.large
    Description: EC2 instance type.
  SSHLocation:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/8
    Description: CIDR block allowed to SSH into the instance.
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: AMI ID for Amazon Linux 2 (automatically latest).
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  SubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet.

Conditions: {}

Resources:
  # KMS Encryption Key (shared for S3, SNS, EBS)
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
      PendingWindowInDays: 7

  EncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/instance-setup-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # Security Group
  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG"

  # IAM Roles and Instance Profile
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*"

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  SSMAutomationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMAutomationRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AutomationPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:StartAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StopAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:DescribeAutomationExecutions
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*"

  # Launch Template with IMDSv2
  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            # Install CloudWatch Agent
            sudo yum install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent
            sudo /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl -a fetch-config -m ec2 -s -c file:/opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc/amazon-cloudwatch-agent.json 2>/dev/null || true
            # Ensure SSM Agent is running (Amazon Linux 2 has it pre-installed)
            sudo systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            sudo systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  # EC2 Instance
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebServerSG
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SourceDestCheck: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WebServer"

  # S3 Bucket for Logging
  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireLogsAfter30Days
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 30
            Prefix: logs/
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LogBucket"

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt EC2SSMRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false

  # SSM Automation Document
  AutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: InstanceSetupAutomation
      DocumentType: Automation
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: "Automation to update OS, install Nginx, and validate web server."
        parameters:
          InstanceId:
            type: String
            description: EC2 instance ID to run commands on.
          AutomationAssumeRole:
            type: String
            description: "IAM role for Automation execution."
            default: ""
        mainSteps:
          - name: OSUpdate
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - "{{ InstanceId }}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - sudo yum update -y
              ServiceRoleArn: "{{ AutomationAssumeRole }}"
          - name: RebootCheck
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - "{{ InstanceId }}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - |
                    needs-restarting -r
                    if [ $? -eq 1 ]; then echo "RebootRequired=true"; else echo "RebootRequired=false"; fi
              ServiceRoleArn: "{{ AutomationAssumeRole }}"
          - name: InstallNginx
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - "{{ InstanceId }}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - sudo amazon-linux-extras enable nginx1
                  - sudo yum clean metadata
                  - sudo yum install -y nginx
              ServiceRoleArn: "{{ AutomationAssumeRole }}"
          - name: ValidateWebServer
            action: aws:runCommand
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - "{{ InstanceId }}"
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - sudo systemctl start nginx
                  - sudo systemctl enable nginx
                  - |
                    HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost)
                    if [ "$HTTP_CODE" -eq 200 ]; then
                      echo "Nginx validation successful"
                    else
                      echo "Nginx validation failed with HTTP code $HTTP_CODE"
                      exit 1
                    fi
              ServiceRoleArn: "{{ AutomationAssumeRole }}"

  # Maintenance Window
  MaintenanceWindow:
    Type: AWS::SSM::MaintenanceWindow
    Properties:
      Name: DailyAutomationWindow
      Description: "Daily maintenance window for automation"
      Schedule: cron(0 2 * * ? *)
      Duration: 3
      Cutoff: 1
      AllowUnassociatedTargets: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MW"

  WindowTarget:
    Type: AWS::SSM::MaintenanceWindowTarget
    Properties:
      WindowId: !Ref MaintenanceWindow
      ResourceType: INSTANCE
      Targets:
        - Key: InstanceIds
          Values:
            - !Ref EC2Instance
      Name: WindowTargetEC2

  WindowTask:
    Type: AWS::SSM::MaintenanceWindowTask
    Properties:
      WindowId: !Ref MaintenanceWindow
      Targets:
        - Key: InstanceIds
          Values:
            - !Ref EC2Instance
      TaskArn: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:automation-definition/InstanceSetupAutomation:$DEFAULT"
      TaskType: AUTOMATION
      TaskParameters:
        InstanceId:
          - !Ref EC2Instance
        AutomationAssumeRole:
          - !GetAtt SSMAutomationRole.Arn
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt SSMAutomationRole.Arn
      MaxErrors: 1
      MaxConcurrency: 1
      Priority: 1
      Name: DailyAutomationTask

  # SNS Topic for Alarm
  AlarmSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CPUAlarmTopic"
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CPUAlarmTopic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  # CloudWatch Alarm
  CPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm if CPU > 80% for 10 minutes"
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: CPUUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref EC2Instance
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref AlarmSNSTopic

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the EC2 web server
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the instance (if assigned)
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket name for logging
    Value: !Ref LogBucket
  AutomationDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document
    Value: !Ref AutomationDocument

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure, monitored web application environment with PHP/Apache and centralized logging.

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI from SSM.

Resources:
  # VPC
  WebAppVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Internet Gateway
  WebAppIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Attach IGW to VPC
  AttachIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref WebAppIGW

  # Public Subnet (no public IP by default)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Default route to IGW
  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref WebAppIGW

  # Associate Route Table with Subnet
  SubnetRouteTableAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group
  WebAppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # IAM Role for EC2
  WebAppInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Instance Profile
  WebAppInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref WebAppInstanceRole

  # Elastic IP for the instance
  WebAppEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # Associate EIP with instance
  WebAppEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref WebAppInstance
      AllocationId: !GetAtt WebAppEIP.AllocationId

  # EC2 Instance
  WebAppInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebAppSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref WebAppInstanceProfile
      Monitoring: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y httpd php
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          cat > /var/www/html/index.php <<EOF
          <?php
          echo "Hello from " . gethostname() . " (" . $_SERVER['SERVER_ADDR'] . ")";
          ?>
          EOF
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # KMS Key for S3 bucket encryption
  LogBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 log bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp

  # KMS Alias for the key
  LogBucketKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/LogBucketKey
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LogBucketKey

  # S3 Bucket for Logs
  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  # S3 Bucket Policy for CloudWatch Logs
  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/webapp/apache:*'

  # CloudWatch Logs Log Group
  WebAppLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /webapp/apache
      RetentionInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: WebApp
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

Outputs:
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the web server
    Value: !GetAtt WebAppEIP.PublicIp
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Cross-account private API Gateway with Lambda backend, VPC endpoint, and custom domain"

Parameters:
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: "API Gateway deployment stage name"

  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: api.example.com
    Description: "Custom domain name for the API Gateway"

  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: "CIDR block for the VPC"

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateApiVPC

  # Private Subnet 1 (AZ1)
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  # Private Subnet 2 (AZ2)
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  # Public Subnet (AZ1)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref "AWS::Region"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet

  # VPC Endpoint Security Group
  VpcEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for API Gateway VPC endpoint"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr

  # Interface VPC Endpoint for API Gateway
  VpcEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ServiceName:
        Fn::Sub: "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.execute-api"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VpcEndpointSecurityGroup
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # Lambda Execution Role
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  # Lambda Function for API backend
  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  "statusCode": 200,
                  "body": json.dumps("Hello from private API"),
                  "headers": {
                      "Content-Type": "application/json"
                  }
              }

  # Lambda Permission for API Gateway
  LambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn:
        Fn::Sub: "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"

  # Private REST API Gateway
  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: PrivateApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
        VpcEndpointIds:
          - !Ref VpcEndpoint
      Policy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: execute-api:Invoke
            Resource:
              Fn::Sub: "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceVpce: !Ref VpcEndpoint
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: execute-api:Invoke
            Resource:
              Fn::Sub: "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:SourceVpce: !Ref VpcEndpoint

  # GET Method on root resource (/) with AWS_PROXY integration
  ApiMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri:
          Fn::Sub: "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${LambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations"

  # API Deployment with Stage
  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - ApiMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      StageName: !Ref StageName

  # Route53 Public Hosted Zone
  HostedZone:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HostedZone
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref CustomDomainName

  # IAM Role for certificate custom resource Lambda
  CertCustomRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CertAndRoute53
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - acm:RequestCertificate
                  - acm:DescribeCertificate
                  - acm:DeleteCertificate
                  - route53:ChangeResourceRecordSets
                  - route53:ListResourceRecordSets
                  - route53:GetChange
                Resource: "*"

  # Custom Resource Lambda for ACM certificate creation
  CertCustomFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt CertCustomRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import time
          import cfnresponse

          acm = boto3.client('acm')
          r53 = boto3.client('route53')

          def handler(event, context):
              request_type = event['RequestType']
              props = event.get('ResourceProperties', {})
              domain_name = props['DomainName']
              hosted_zone_id = props['HostedZoneId']

              try:
                  if request_type == 'Create':
                      resp = acm.request_certificate(
                          DomainName=domain_name,
                          ValidationMethod='DNS',
                          IdempotencyToken='ct-' + str(int(time.time()))
                      )
                      cert_arn = resp['CertificateArn']

                      time.sleep(2)
                      desc = acm.describe_certificate(CertificateArn=cert_arn)
                      dns_record = None
                      for opt in desc['Certificate']['DomainValidationOptions']:
                          if 'ResourceRecord' in opt:
                              dns_record = opt['ResourceRecord']
                              break

                      if dns_record:
                          r53.change_resource_record_sets(
                              HostedZoneId=hosted_zone_id,
                              ChangeBatch={
                                  'Changes': [{
                                      'Action': 'UPSERT',
                                      'ResourceRecordSet': {
                                          'Name': dns_record['Name'],
                                          'Type': dns_record['Type'],
                                          'TTL': 60,
                                          'ResourceRecords': [{'Value': dns_record['Value']}]
                                      }
                                  }]
                              }
                          )

                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS,
                                       {'CertificateArn': cert_arn},
                                       physicalResourceId=cert_arn)

                  elif request_type == 'Update':
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS,
                                       {},
                                       physicalResourceId=event.get('PhysicalResourceId'))

                  elif request_type == 'Delete':
                      cert_arn = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', '')
                      if 'arn:aws:acm:' in cert_arn:
                          try:
                              acm.delete_certificate(CertificateArn=cert_arn)
                          except Exception:
                              pass
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS)

              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Message': str(e)})

  # Custom Resource that provisions the ACM certificate
  ApiCertificate:
    Type: Custom::CertificateCreator
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt CertCustomFunction.Arn
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      HostedZoneId: !Ref HostedZone

  # API Gateway Domain Name
  ApiDomainName:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      RegionalCertificateArn: !GetAtt ApiCertificate.CertificateArn
      SecurityPolicy: TLS_1_2

  # Base Path Mapping
  BasePathMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref ApiDomainName
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Stage: !Ref StageName

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayUrl:
    Description: "Private API Gateway URL"
    Value:
      Fn::Sub: "https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}"
  CustomDomainUrl:
    Description: "Custom domain URL"
    Value:
      Fn::Sub: "https://${CustomDomainName}"
  VpcEndpointId:
    Description: "VPC Endpoint ID"
    Value: !Ref VpcEndpoint

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Basic AWS Lambda function with IAM role and CloudWatch logging

Parameters:
  FunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyLambdaFunction
    AllowedPattern: "^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$"
    Description: Name for the Lambda function

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref FunctionName
      Runtime: nodejs22.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return event.key1;
          };

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt MyLambdaFunction.Arn
